sources.name: Themezer
sources.themeListQuery: { wiiu { themes(paginationArgs: { limit: 500, page: 1 }) { nodes { uuid name description downloadCount saveCount updatedAt creator { username } downloadUrl collagePreview { thumbUrl hdUrl } launcherScreenshot { thumbUrl hdUrl } waraWaraPlazaScreenshot { thumbUrl hdUrl } launcherBgUrl waraWaraPlazaBgUrl tags { name } } } } }
sources.updateCheckQuery: { wiiu { themes(paginationArgs: { limit: 50, page: 1 }) { nodes { uuid updatedAt } } } }
